steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage notes that modern planes have much sleeker, more streamlined bodies, which explains why they are more aerodynamic.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
“As a result” shows a cause‑effect link, fitting the idea that sleeker bodies lead to greater aerodynamics. The other three either contradict, are unrelated, or reverse the relationship.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
